description: An `<auth check="checkAdmin">` block carries a gate predicate (the server-fn check= form, a well-formed runtime-fallback gate per §40.9.5) so it does NOT fire E-AUTH-GRAPH-004 (the whole E-AUTH-GRAPH-* family stays silent). The W-AUTH-RUNTIME-FALLBACK info-lint on the check= form is out of the E-AUTH-GRAPH scope.
